title: Create Portfolio-Ready Power BI Visualizations (Streamlined)
description: Fast-track approach to create 2-3 portfolio-quality Power BI pages for erikemilsson.com. Uses existing data connections and minimal new DAX measures instead of full redesign. Complements (doesn't replace) Task 002/003.

task_verification.notes: Pre-migration task — verification predates current schema.

acceptanceCriteria: 2-3 polished Power BI pages created (vs. 5 pages in Task 003)
Page 1: Executive Dashboard (spend, trends, geographic distribution)
Page 2: Risk & Sustainability Analysis (supply concentration, EPI scores)
5-10 new DAX measures implemented (vs. 40+ in Task 002)
Professional formatting with consistent color scheme
Export high-quality screenshots + PDF for portfolio website
Interactive PBIX file ready to share with recruiters
Brief case study document (1-2 pages) describing insights
notes: SCOPE REDUCTION: This is a streamlined 'portfolio shortcut' approach
Uses existing report structure - clean up and enhance vs. rebuild from scratch
Focuses on visual impact and storytelling over technical completeness
Can be completed in 1-2 days vs. 8-10 days for full Task 002+003 approach
Does NOT replace Task 002/003 - those remain available for full implementation later
Deliverable: Screenshots + PDF + PBIX + case study for erikemilsson.com
deliverables: 2-3 Power BI report pages (polished and professional)
5-10 new DAX measures (strategic, high-impact measures only)
Case study document explaining business context and insights
approach: Step 1: Clean existing report (remove debug visuals, fix layout)
Step 2: Add 5-10 strategic DAX measures (e.g., YoY growth, risk scores)
Step 3: Create 2 polished pages with clear narrative
Step 4: Apply professional theme and formatting
Step 5: Export portfolio assets (screenshots, PDF, case study)
